title: Projects
text:
Analyzed monthly operating costs to identify key spending trends.



Tools: Excel, Power Query, Power BI


Action: Built dashboards and automated reporting


Result: Improved visibility of expenses and supported budgeting decisions






Compared planned budgets with actual results to identify variances.



Tools: Excel


Action: Performed variance analysis and reporting


Result: Supported financial planning and decision-making

title: CV
text:
Accounting and finance professional with over 10 years of experience in financial reporting, budgeting, and business operations.
Experienced in working within international environments, including a French pharmaceutical company and a German manufacturing firm. Strong background in supporting financial decision-making and improving business processes.
Currently expanding my skill set in data analytics to enhance financial planning and analysis (FP&A).

title: About Me
text:
Hello, I’m Saori Kikuchi.
I have over 10 years of experience in accounting and finance, including financial reporting, budgeting, and ERP system implementation in international environments.
In recent years, I have developed a strong interest in data analytics and its application to finance.

title: About Me
text:
Career Goals
My goal is to transition into a role that combines finance and data analytics, particularly in FP&A or business analysis.
I aim to leverage my accounting background together with data-driven insights to improve financial performance and support strategic decision-making.
